# so_ase.helpers_regression

### Functions

| [`anomaly2D_fesom`](../so_ase.md#so_ase.helpers_regression.anomaly2D_fesom)(src_path, mesh_diag_path[, ...])                | Compute 2D anomalies of FESOM data over a specified reference period, with optional horizontal interpolation to a regular lat-lon grid.                               |
|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [`dataset_regression_on_time_1D`](../so_ase.md#so_ase.helpers_regression.dataset_regression_on_time_1D)(ds, varname[, ...]) | Performs linear regression of a variable in a Dataset over its time axis.                                                                                             |
| [`grid_fesom`](../so_ase.md#so_ase.helpers_regression.grid_fesom)(src_path, fname, mesh_diag_path)                          | Read in 2D fesom data and do horizontal interpolation to a regular lat-lon grid.                                                                                      |
| [`regression2D_fesom`](../so_ase.md#so_ase.helpers_regression.regression2D_fesom)(src_path, mesh_diag_path)                 | Perform linear regression on a FESOM2 variable over time at each unstructured grid node, and optionally interpolate the regression results to a regular lon-lat grid. |
| [`regression2D_hadlsst`](../so_ase.md#so_ase.helpers_regression.regression2D_hadlsst)(src_path[, years, box, ...])          | Perform 2D linear regression on Hadley Centre SST or SIC data over a specified region and time range.                                                                 |
| [`regression2D_nsidc`](../so_ase.md#so_ase.helpers_regression.regression2D_nsidc)(src_path[, years, box, ...])              | Perform 2D linear regression on NSIDC SIC data over a specified region and time range.                                                                                |
| [`xrlinregress`](../so_ase.md#so_ase.helpers_regression.xrlinregress)(first_samples, second_samples, dim)                   |                                                                                                                                                                       |
